name: Heroes of Magic & Cards
short_description: Build the perfect deck, draw the perfect hand, and strike down your enemies with pairs and straights. Heroes of Magic & Cards is a roguelike deckbuilder with a poker twist, sending you and your fifty-two into a mystical fantasy world of monsters and magecraft!
detailed_description:
Build the perfect deck, draw the perfect hand, and strike down your enemies with pairs and straights. Heroes of Magic & Cards is a roguelike deckbuilder with a poker twist, sending you and your fifty-two into a mystical fantasy world of monsters and magecraft!

OVERVIEW

Heroes of Magic and Cards is an inventive deckbuilding poker roguelike that rewards both careful buildcrafting and poker skills. Choose your class and chart your path across the world, from encounter to encounter, upgrading your deck, collecting relics, and refining your tactics to take down powerful bosses, earning powerful rewards!

FEATURES

  • Choose from three heroes with access to over 90 abilities, changing the flow of the game in both subtle and spectacular ways. Cast Chain Lightning or Hellfire for massive damage! Use Sacrifice to trade health-points for more cards!

  • Collect more than 40 different enchantments as you journey across the world, upgrading your cards and finding explosive synergies.

  • Discover hundreds of powerful hidden relics that completely change the game, cutting your max-HP in exchange for vampiric healing, or doubling the power of odd-numbered cards in exchange for weakening the evens!

  • Poker-hands such as straights, pairs, etc activate devastating combo-effects that leave opponents in ruin! Carefully manage your cards to pull off dazzling finishers!

  • Play relaxing mini-games like fishing and gambling for extra rewards.

YOUR DECK IS YOUR SWORD AND SHIELD

Cards are everything in Heroes of Magic and Cards! Your hand determines how much damage you can do and what abilities you can activate, such as building Rage or striking the enemy with Lightning! 

By collecting enchantments for your cards, you can improve their number value (change a “5” into a “6”), switch their suit (change a “diamond” into a “spade”), or apply special effects, including card-cloning and poison. By changing your cards’ suits or values you can continually improve your chances of drawing powerful poker-hands, which trigger devastating combo-effects.

POKER MEETS ROGUELIKE!

As you traverse the worldmap, discover relics, enchantments, consumable items, and expansions for your character’s natural class-abilities. Different discoveries and strategies will yield explosive synergies. At the same time, your inner poker-shark will feast!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil

reviews.review_text: This game only having 15 reviews so far is criminal. It's a damn good game, deserves a lot more sales than this.

interesting game with great builds. though the mini game lose gold is annoying.
but the gold in game is infinite, if u just wanna to farm.
some suggestion about balance:
1. druid is weird, 3 form combo point won't stack & confict, low damage and can't infinite loop, even hard to finish combo if not unlock Living Essence.
2. druid have the most no Hand Power buff skills, i can't image why design these skills, card draw is a precious resource, waste card in trash skill is unaccepable.
3. mage is too op, Splash Enhance + FireBlash make easy otk + infi loop. Lighting Bolt just cost 1 club, have 50% chance to cast 2 another bolts, make druid Eagle form just like a joke.
u should laugh at druid after play this game :D

Charming game with a deep combat system. Similar to Slay the Spire in many ways it's novel use of the 52 card deck for the fantasy genre opens up a lot of possibilities. It is difficult even for experience players. Highly recommended.

I think this is a good deck builder game. It's definitely enjoyable. 
Although I still think it needs work. Some abilities you rarely ever use throughout the entire run.
I think that worm boss needs another look at as well. For a first boss just seems a little much.

I don't think it's a game I can recommend as it is at the moment.

Oh wow! What a delightful game! I had dipped my toes into the roguelike/light card collecting genre by playing some Slay the Spire 1 & 2. The latter very recently. This game has a great pixel art style with plenty of personality.

The classes are fun so far, and opening chests to get random loot and killing monsters is a blast. I almost wish these devs would get the same reception/rampant popularity as STS2! Can only imagine what this team could do with plenty of funding.

A++ work, guys. Really addicted at this point!
